.file-embed.background: rgb(43, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-file-title::after.background: rgb(230, 230, 230) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.nav-file-title::after.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.status-bar.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(28, 28, 28) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf-content.background: rgb(28, 28, 28) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none no-repeat scroll 100% 4px / 13.2px padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsl(0, 0%, 20%) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsl(0, 0%, 20%), color-mix(in srgb, hsl(0, 0%, 20%) 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsl(0, 0%, 20%) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsl(0, 0%, 20%), color-mix(in srgb, hsl(0, 0%, 20%) 65%, transparent))
body.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")
body.background: rgb(28, 28, 28) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(28, 28, 28) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
